data.title: Star Minerals Releases 2025 Corporate Governance Statement
data.description:
The latest update is out from Star Minerals Ltd. ( (AU:SMS) ).

Star Minerals Limited has released its corporate governance statement for the financial year ending June 30, 2025, which is available on their website. The statement confirms that the company has adhered to the ASX Corporate Governance Council’s recommendations, detailing their board’s roles and responsibilities, director appointment checks, and accountability of the company secretary to the board. This announcement underscores Star Minerals’ commitment to transparency and adherence to governance standards, which is crucial for maintaining investor confidence and ensuring regulatory compliance.

More about Star Minerals Ltd.

Average Trading Volume: 1,786,754

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: VinaCapital Vietnam Opportunity Fund Repurchases Shares, Adjusts Voting Rights
data.description:
VinaCapital Vietnam Opportunity Fund Limited AccumUSD ( (GB:VOF) ) has issued an update.

On 25 September 2025, VinaCapital Vietnam Opportunity Fund Limited repurchased 75,206 of its own ordinary shares, which will be held as treasury shares. This transaction affects the total number of voting rights, now standing at 131,973,739, which is relevant for shareholders under the FCA Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules.

Spark’s Take on GB:VOF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:VOF is a Neutral.

VinaCapital Vietnam Opportunity Fund Limited shows strong financial stability with zero debt and solid profitability. Despite positive sentiment from earnings calls and strategic corporate events, technical analysis indicates bearish trends, and valuation lacks complete clarity. The company’s revenue and cash flow volatility remain concerns. Overall, the stock is moderately positioned with strengths in financial health but requires cautious monitoring of market momentum and valuation metrics.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:VOF stock, click here.

More about VinaCapital Vietnam Opportunity Fund Limited AccumUSD

VinaCapital Vietnam Opportunity Fund Limited (VOF) is a registered closed-ended investment scheme incorporated in Guernsey. It operates under the Guernsey Financial Services Commission and focuses on investment opportunities in Vietnam, offering a range of financial products and services.

Average Trading Volume: 178,489

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: DigitalX Limited Issues New Shares, Reinforces Market Confidence
data.description:
An announcement from DigitalX Limited ( (AU:DCC) ) is now available.

DigitalX Limited has announced the issuance of 8,243,243 fully paid ordinary shares, as per the Corporations Act 2001, without the need for disclosure to investors. This move reflects the company’s compliance with relevant legal provisions and indicates no presence of excluded information, potentially reinforcing its operational transparency and market confidence.

More about DigitalX Limited

DigitalX Ltd (ASX:DCC) is a pioneering Australian digital investment manager and the sole ASX-listed crypto fund manager. With over six years of experience in digital asset management, the company has achieved notable success, including having its Bitcoin Fund rated as the top-performing fund in Australia for 2023 by Morningstar. DigitalX serves domestic individual wholesale investors and family offices, managing Australia’s first ASX-listed spot Bitcoin ETF and employing a Bitcoin Treasury strategy to enhance shareholder value.

Average Trading Volume: 6,334,407

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$87.35M

data.title: Ratos AB Announces Nomination Committee for 2026 AGM
data.description:
Ratos AB ( ($SE:RATO.B) ) has issued an update.

Ratos AB has announced the formation of its Nomination Committee in preparation for the 2026 Annual General Meeting (AGM), scheduled for March 25, 2026, in Stockholm, Sweden. The committee, which includes representatives from major shareholders, is tasked with evaluating the Board of Directors’ composition and drafting proposals for board elections, auditor appointments, and remuneration. This move underscores Ratos’s commitment to transparent governance and stakeholder engagement, potentially influencing its strategic direction and reinforcing its market position.

The most recent analyst rating on ($SE:RATO.B) stock is a Hold with a SEK37.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ratos AB stock, see the SE:RATO.B Stock Forecast page.

More about Ratos AB

Ratos is a Swedish publicly listed business group comprising 14 companies across three business areas: Construction & Services, Industry, and Consumer. Operating mainly in the Nordic region, Ratos reported net sales of SEK 32 billion and an adjusted EBITA of SEK 2.3 billion in 2024, with a workforce of approximately 10,900 employees. Headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden, Ratos emphasizes a corporate culture based on simplicity, speed in execution, and a focus on people, enabling its subsidiaries to thrive as part of a larger entity.

Average Trading Volume: 522,966

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: SEK11.66B

Learn more about RATO.B stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Nanosonics Director Adjusts Equity Holdings
data.description:
Nanosonics Limited ( (AU:NAN) ) has shared an update.

Nanosonics Limited announced a change in the director’s interest, specifically regarding Mr. Michael Kavanagh’s holdings. The change involved the exercise of performance and service rights under the Nanosonics Omnibus Equity Plan, resulting in the acquisition of 109,685 ordinary shares. This adjustment in the director’s holdings reflects the company’s ongoing commitment to aligning management interests with shareholder value, potentially impacting investor confidence and market perception.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:NAN) stock is a Buy with a A$4.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nanosonics Limited stock, see the AU:NAN Stock Forecast page.

More about Nanosonics Limited

Nanosonics Limited operates in the medical technology industry, specializing in infection prevention solutions. The company is known for its innovative products, including the trophon® EPR, which is a market-leading device for high-level disinfection of ultrasound probes.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$1.25B

data.title: Gecoss Corporation to Receive Significant Dividend from Subsidiary
data.description:
Gecoss Corporation ( (JP:9991) ) has shared an update.

Gecoss Corporation announced it will receive a dividend of 3,200 million yen from its subsidiary, Rentalsystem Company, Limited. This dividend will be recorded as non-operating income in Gecoss’s non-consolidated financial statements for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2026, with no impact on the consolidated financial statements.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9991) stock is a Buy with a Yen1450.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Gecoss Corporation stock, see the JP:9991 Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Greenwing Resources Announces 2024 AGM Date and Director Nomination Deadline
data.description:
Greenwing Resources Ltd ( (AU:GW1) ) has shared an update.

Greenwing Resources Ltd has announced that its 2024 Annual General Meeting (AGM) will be held on November 25, 2025. The company has set October 7, 2025, as the deadline for director nomination submissions. This announcement underscores Greenwing’s ongoing commitment to governance and strategic planning as it continues to position itself as a key player in the critical minerals sector, with potential implications for stakeholders involved in the electrification and advanced materials markets.

More about Greenwing Resources Ltd

Greenwing Resources Ltd is an Australian-based company specializing in the exploration and development of critical minerals essential for a sustainable future. The company focuses on lithium and graphite projects located in Madagascar and Argentina, aiming to serve electrification markets and advance materials research and development.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

data.title: Advance Metals Responds to ASX Query and Updates on Capital Raise
data.description:
The latest update is out from Pacific American Holdings Ltd. ( (AU:AVM) ).

Advance Metals Limited (ASX:AVM) has clarified its position in response to an ASX query regarding its interactions with S3 Consortium Pty Ltd and East Coast Research. The company confirmed that no undisclosed information was shared with these entities and that it complied with Listing Rule 15.7. AVM also stated that it did not approve the contents of the East Coast Research report, which was considered a ‘public report’ under the JORC Code after further review. The company is progressing with a proposed capital raise and disclosed that the consideration paid to Next Investors is material.

More about Pacific American Holdings Ltd.

Average Trading Volume: 5,165,287

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: A$27.37M

data.title: Gakken Holdings Forms Strategic Alliance with Nippon Life
data.description:
Gakken Holdings Co., Ltd. ( (JP:9470) ) just unveiled an update.

Gakken Holdings Co., Ltd. has announced a strategic capital and business alliance with Nippon Life Insurance Company to enhance its operations in the nursing care and childcare sectors. This collaboration aims to integrate the expertise and networks of both companies to improve industry sustainability, develop new business models, and support local communities. Nippon Life will acquire a 2% stake in Gakken Holdings, and the partnership will focus on joint initiatives in nursing care, childcare, and educational content development.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9470) stock is a Hold with a Yen1022.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Gakken Holdings Co., Ltd. stock, see the JP:9470 Stock Forecast page.

More about Gakken Holdings Co., Ltd.

Gakken Holdings Co., Ltd. operates in the education and healthcare industry, focusing on providing services and products related to nursing care, childcare, and educational content. The company aims to leverage its expertise and resources to support operators in these sectors and contribute to sustainable community development.

Average Trading Volume: 91,908

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen46.57B
